subcodes.first_line: O namesake of this servant of God! Thy name is Ghulam-Husayn, and Husayn is one of the blessed names. Therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی این عبد الهی نام تو غلامحسینست و حسین اسمی از اسماء مبارک پس سمی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for governments and rulers, @praise and encouragement
